allow: Bash(node -e "const ts = require\('typescript'\); const src = require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('app/api/agents/commercial/route.ts', 'utf8'\); const result = ts.transpileModule\(src, { compilerOptions: { target: ts.ScriptTarget.ESNext, module: ts.ModuleKind.ESNext, jsx: ts.JsxEmit.Preserve, esModuleInterop: true, strict: false } }\); console.log\('OK - transpiled successfully'\)" 2>&1)

Bash(node -e "const ts = require\('typescript'\); const files = ['app/api/agents/email/daily/route.ts', 'lib/agents/pipeline.ts', 'app/api/agents/dm-instagram/route.ts', 'app/api/agents/tiktok-comments/route.ts']; for \(const f of files\) { try { const src = require\('fs'\).readFileSync\(f, 'utf8'\); ts.transpileModule\(src, { compilerOptions: { target: ts.ScriptTarget.ESNext, module: ts.ModuleKind.ESNext, jsx: ts.JsxEmit.Preserve, esModuleInterop: true, strict: false } }\); console.log\('OK:', f\); } catch\(e\) { console.error\('FAIL:', f, e.message\); } }" 2>&1)

Bash(node -e "const ts = require\('typescript'\); const files = ['app/api/agents/dm-instagram/route.ts', 'app/api/agents/commercial/route.ts']; for \(const f of files\) { try { const src = require\('fs'\).readFileSync\(f, 'utf8'\); ts.transpileModule\(src, { compilerOptions: { target: ts.ScriptTarget.ESNext, module: ts.ModuleKind.ESNext, jsx: ts.JsxEmit.Preserve, esModuleInterop: true, strict: false } }\); console.log\('OK:', f\); } catch\(e\) { console.error\('FAIL:', f, e.message.substring\(0,200\)\); } }" 2>&1)
